case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.(USA) VS. LUIS ALBERTO MORALES et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-05-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-26-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.(USA) SERVED APR-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, LUIS ALBERTO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.(USA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, LUIS ALBERTO $4,902.46 PRINCIPAL, $279.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,182.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $279.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, LUIS ALBERTO

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-11-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION RE CCP 1033B FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.(USA)

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.(USA) AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, LUIS ALBERTO DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-11-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2008
